# New York Fine Foods

> NYC's premier pizza truck, catering, and mobile bar company. We bring authentic
> Neapolitan pizza trucks, full-service catering, and off-premise bar service to
> weddings, corporate events, and parties across New York City and the Tri-State Area.

## About
New York Fine Foods serves all five NYC boroughs — Manhattan, Brooklyn, Queens,
the Bronx, and Staten Island — plus the greater Tri-State Area (Long Island,
Westchester, New Jersey, and Connecticut). Pizza truck catering packages start at $1,500.
Phone: (516) 205-7629.

## Services
- [Pizza Truck Rental & Catering](https://www.newyorkfinefoods.com/pizza-trucks): Authentic Neapolitan pizza fired fresh on-site in a mobile 900°F oven; scales from ~25 to 5,000+ guests. Packages start at $1,500.
- [Catering](https://www.newyorkfinefoods.com/catering): Hot trays, salads, party heros, and custom menus for events from 20 to 1,000 guests.
- [Mobile Bar](https://www.newyorkfinefoods.com/mobile-bar): Professional bartenders and full off-premise bar service, from beer & wine to open-bar packages.
